title: Acrocentron scabiosa
intro: Acrocentron scabiosa, also known as Scabiosa, is a plant species in the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae) native to Europe and Asia. The health benefits of Acrocentron scabiosa include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Acrocentron scabiosa is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and promote digestive well-being.
